title: Unusual Spawning
description: An addon for Unusual Prehistory 2 that add natural spawning system for both mob and plants
body:
This addon will add a natural spawn system to both mobs and plants from [Unusual Prehistory 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/unusual-prehistory-2) mods that exist on their respective biome.

### List of Mob biomes
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Carnotaurus - Savanna, Badlands
- Diplocaulus - Swamp, Mangrove Swamp
- Dromaeosaurus - Plains, Forests
- Dunkleosteus - Warm Ocean, Lukewarm Ocean
- Jawless Fish - Warm Ocean, Lukewarm Ocean
- Kentrosaurus - Plains, Jungle, Savanna, Forests
- Kimmeridgebrachypteraeschnidium - Swamp, Beach
- Majungasaurus - Jungles, Beach 
- Megalania - Savanna
- Metriorhynchus - Warm Ocean, Lukewarm Ocean
- Onchopristis - Rivers
- Stethacanthus - Warm Ocean, Lukewarm Ocean
- Talpanas - Dark Forest, Lush Caves, Beach
- Tartuosteus - Warm Ocean, Lukewarm Ocean, Deep Ocean, Deep Lukewarm Ocean, Ocean
- Telecrex - Plains, Meadow, Savanna
- Kaprosuchus - Savanna
- Desmatosuchus - Swamp
- Lystrosaurus - Swamp
- Pachycephalosaurus - Badlands
- Psilopterus - Savanna
- Leptictidium - Desert, Badlands
- Ulughbegsaurus - Plains, Beach
- Coelacanthus - Deep Ocean
- Lobe Finned Fish - River
- Hibbertopterus - Swamps
- Pterodactylus - Caves, Beach
- Brachiosaurus - Sparse Jungle
- Praepusa -  Frozen Ocean, Snowy Beach
- Aegirocassis - Deep Ocean
- Mosasaurus - Deep Ocean

</details>

### List of Plants biome

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Gingko - Forests
- Lepidodendron - Swamps
- Bennettitales - Badlands, Deserts
- Calamophyton - Swamps
- Cladophlebis - Swamps, Forests, Jungles
- Cooksonia - Meadow, Plains
- Horsetail - Swamps, Forests, Jungles
- Giant Horsetail - Swamps, Forests, Jungles
- Leefructus - Swamps, Forests, Jungles, Plains
- Moss Layer - Swamps
- Quillwort - Swamps, Rivers
- Raiguenrayun - Sunflower Plains
- Rhynia - Swamps, Beach
- Aethophylllum - Jungles, Swamp
- Archaeosigillaria - Swamp
- Brachyphyllum - Old Growth Taiga, Swamp
- Neomariopteris - Badlands, Desert
- Tempskya - Old Growth Taiga
- Delitzschala Stalk - Swamps
- Zhangsolva Bloom - Sunflower Plains

</details>

## This addon is also compatible with:
- [Spawn](https://modrinth.com/mod/spawn-mod)
- [Windswept](https://modrinth.com/mod/windswept)
- [Environmental](https://modrinth.com/mod/environmental)
- [Atmospheric](https://modrinth.com/mod/atmospheric)
- [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit)
- [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)
- [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone)
- [Region Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored)

## Special Thanks to:
- Unusual Prehistory 2 Team for creating the mod
- [Platypus](https://modrinth.com/user/platypushasnohat), for helping and tweaking the spawn system

If you found any problem or bugs, please report to the comment section or [discord server](https://discord.gg/BDaUYEq9)
